npl-math.description: Essential math utilities: GCD, LCM, primes, factorial, Fibonacci, clamp, lerp, mean, median, and more.
npl-math.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-strings.description: String utilities: padding, repetition, truncation, word splitting, line wrapping, and more.
npl-strings.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-collections.description: Collection utilities: zip, flatten, chunk, unique, frequencies, take, drop, range, and more.
npl-collections.author: Txtcode Core Team

npl-datetime.description: Date/time helpers: today, format_date, relative_time, is_leap_year, days_in_month, and more.
npl-datetime.author: Txtcode Core Team
